compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for ticket-lifecycle.sh bulk compact and archive
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh` with behavioral tests for the lifecycle script.

## File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh`
- Modify: `.test-index` (add mapping with RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (RED)
- `test_lifecycle_bulk_compact`: Create repo with 3 tickets: one with 15 events, one with 5 events, one with 12 events. Run lifecycle. Verify only tickets above 10-event threshold get compacted (SNAPSHOT created).
- `test_lifecycle_archives_eligible_tickets`: Create closed ticket with no open dependents. Run lifecycle. Verify ARCHIVED event written.
- `test_lifecycle_preserves_ineligible_tickets`: Create closed ticket reachable from open ticket. Run lifecycle. Verify NO ARCHIVED event.
- `test_lifecycle_single_git_commit`: Run lifecycle. Verify all changes in a single commit (git log -1 shows both compact and archive changes).
- `test_lifecycle_configurable_base_path`: Run with --base-path flag pointing to custom tracker dir. Verify it operates on that path.
RED because ticket-lifecycle.sh doesn't exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists with 5+ test functions
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh && grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Tests fail RED
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-lifecycle.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-lifecycle.sh.*test-ticket-lifecycle' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
